hook.name: LayerMeme Dynamic Fee Hook v2 (Base)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook used by the LAYERMEME token launch platform. It dynamically adjusts LP fees based on volatility, collects a protocol fee on launched token swaps, and supports optional MEV protection modules and per-pool extensions via custom swap data. The source is verified on BaseScan and the hook is deployed on Base mainnet.
